name: PBT Group Limited
summary: PBT Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides specialized consulting services to finance, insurance, healthcare, retail, and telecommunication sectors in South Africa, Europe, and Australia. The company engages in the fields of data platform, data engineering, data analytics, data visualization, application development, cloud solutions, and strategic consulting. It offers specialist healthcare management solutions and services, including real time claims processing, query capabilities, electronic data interchange, document management services, and membership and contribution management, as well as medical savings account management to medical aid and managed care sectors. The company also provides business intelligence services; and develops micro PC's and embedded devices, and mobile apps. In addition, it develops business systems, mobile applications, and Web applications comprising software development lifecycle, business analysis, and software architecture and development. The company was formerly known as Prescient Limited and change to PBT Group Limited. PBT Group Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Cape Town, South Africa.
